mapper.select: SELECT id, drug_no, name, specification, unit, unit_price FROM drug
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug (drug_no, name, specification, unit, unit_price) VALUES (#{drugNo}, #{name}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE drug SET drug_no = #{drugNo}, name = #{name}, specification = #{specification}, unit = #{unit}, unit_price = #{unitPrice} WHERE id = #{id}
